name: Customer Persona Builder
description: Customer Persona Builder - Marketing template for brand professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Start With What You Know Go to the Persona Builder tab. Start filling in the fields you already know — demographics, job title, industry. Do not overthink it. First drafts are meant to be rough. Step 2: Add Psychographics This is where personas come alive. Fill in goals, frustrations, values, and fears. What does this person actually care about? What keeps them up at night? This section separates useful personas from useless ones. Step 3: Map the Buying Journey How does this person discover solutions like yours? What research do they do? Who influences their de

sections.title: Dashboard
sections.description: Auto-calculated summary of your data. Complete the working sections to see results here.

sections.title: Goals & Challenges

fields.placeholder: The #1 thing they are trying to achieve

sections.title: Buying Journey & Decision
sections.description: [Persona Builder] Complete the Buying Journey & Decision section

fields.label: Awareness Trigger
fields.placeholder: What event makes them realize they need a solution?
fields.helpText: What event makes them realize they need a solution?

fields.label: Research Behavior
fields.placeholder: How do they evaluate options? Compare, demo, ask peers?
fields.helpText: How do they evaluate options? Compare, demo, ask peers?

fields.label: Decision Criteria
fields.placeholder: Price, features, trust, speed, support, brand?
fields.helpText: Price, features, trust, speed, support, brand?

fields.label: Key Objections
fields.placeholder: What would stop them from buying?
fields.helpText: What would stop them from buying?

fields.label: Decision Timeline
fields.placeholder: Impulse, weeks, months, or committee cycles?
fields.helpText: Impulse, weeks, months, or committee cycles?

fields.label: Decision Influencers
fields.placeholder: Who else is involved — boss, partner, team?
fields.helpText: Who else is involved — boss, partner, team?

fields.label: Preferred Buying Channel
fields.placeholder: Online, in-person, through a partner, referral?
fields.helpText: Online, in-person, through a partner, referral?

fields.label: Budget Authority
fields.placeholder: Do they control the budget or need approval?
fields.helpText: Do they control the budget or need approval?

fields.label: Competitor Alternatives
fields.placeholder: What else are they considering?
fields.helpText: What else are they considering?

fields.label: Deal Breakers
fields.placeholder: What would make them walk away instantly?
fields.helpText: What would make them walk away instantly?

sections.title: Communication & Content Preferences

fields.helpText: What makes them unsubscribe or ignore?
